description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Use a matrix strategy to test across multiple Python versions and operating systems, including Windows, macOS, and Ubuntu. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python with caching, install dependencies, run Tox tests, and upload coverage to Codecov. Additionally, perform CLI tests on Ubuntu and verify that emojis.json is up-to-date.
